creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think that it's time to de-orbit the port altogether.

The loadable binary has been broken for quite some time.
It's hard to fix it and to maintain it.

ISO/USB image could always be had from the upstream.

Nowadays, it also provides an EFI binary that can be placed into the EFI partition and started via EFI shell.
So, there would not be much value in the binary built by the port.
